description_long: This is a small, single-story wooden cabin with a dark brown exterior and a green gabled roof featuring a rectangular skylight. The front facade has a covered porch with steps leading up to it, supported by simple posts and railings. The cabin has several rectangular windows with yellow trim, distributed asymmetrically along the sides. The structure is elevated slightly above the ground on short supports, giving it a raised appearance. The materials suggest a sturdy, weather-resistant build suitable for residential or recreational use. The overall design is simple and functional, with rustic elements and minimal ornamentation.
description: A small, raised wooden cabin with a green gabled roof, front porch, and several rectangular windows with yellow trim.
description_view_0: Front view showing the porch, steps, and main entrance, with the gabled roof and skylight visible.
description_view_1: Side view displaying three rectangular windows and the full length of the green roof with skylight.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain wall with no windows or doors, and the roof's overhang.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a single window and partial view of the porch structure.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with moderate pitch, green shingle texture, and a single rectangular skylight
attribute_window_arrangement: Asymmetrical arrangement with three small rectangular windows on one side, one on the opposite side, all with yellow trim; no windows on the rear wall
attribute_door_placement: Single exterior door centered on the front facade, accessed via the porch and steps
